# python/unciv_train

> 9 source file(s) in python/unciv_train.

- `__init__.py` — Documents the package purpose: self-play policy training, ONNX export, and round-loop evaluation for Unciv learning curves.
  <!-- map sha:27adfe002203e45208653e4af4eeffa5c28eb94f symbols: -->
- `analyze.py` — Compares acceptance experiment curves, computes convergence and ceiling statistics, runs final evaluations, and writes reports and overlay plots.
  <!-- map sha:858398951d0c4a51ef0cd73617e8b84c91d9618b symbols:_read_curve,_stddev,_two_proportion_z,_overlay,main -->
- `contract.py` — Defines Python-side ONNX tensor names, metadata keys, schema-derived dimensions, token specs, and provenance helpers matching the JVM contract.
  <!-- map sha:b1589262c93245c32c784deafc362f22beca4327 symbols:Dims,_schema,dims_from_schema,fingerprint_from_schema,schema_version_from_schema,token_specs_from_schema -->
- `dataset.py` — Loads trajectory shards, validates schema/ruleset provenance, extracts learner steps, masks, rewards, and rich observation blocks for training.
  <!-- map sha:bd55a47c89b6dd57fd8c1f9adbe4d2c500e7cf9a symbols:ProvenanceError,TrainStep,TrainTrajectory,_learner_slot,load_training_steps,_rich_step_blocks,load_trajectories -->
- `export_onnx.py` — Exports blind or rich trained policy networks to policy-only ONNX with fixed outputs and JVM-readable contract metadata.
  <!-- map sha:02b815cbcf4e12cfbc4ec181624cccb4de59617c symbols:_PolicyOnly,_RichPolicyOnly,export,export_rich -->
- `features.py` — Builds padded rich multi-tensor batches from trajectory observation blocks, including token masks for spatial and entity sets.
  <!-- map sha:9d768793923b69325caf1fdb89d15e42ba720da9 symbols:_pad_token_set,build_rich_batch,build_rich_single -->
- `model.py` — Implements blind MLP and rich token-pooling actor-critic networks producing tech logits, policy logits, and training-only value estimates.
  <!-- map sha:e8434ee12a922c98bf5d5334737905a810cd5711 symbols:_small_init_value_head,PolicyNet,masked_pool,_TokenEncoder,RichPolicyValueNet -->
- `run_loop.py` — Orchestrates self-play generation, training, ONNX export, evaluation, curve plotting, and verdict reporting across repeated rounds.
  <!-- map sha:35454376b32da7b5bdf244dad8da90b205a24185 symbols:gradle_selfplay,generate,evaluate,train_round,verdict,plot,_read_existing_rows,main -->
- `train.py` — Implements masked-action policy optimization using REINFORCE baseline and blind/rich actor-critic training with GAE.
  <!-- map sha:be7eabf869d83ce8d70f0bda4a013a497d162716 symbols:_masked_logp,_entropy,compute_gae,train_reinforce,_optimize_actor_critic,_stack_traj,train_actor_critic_blind,train_actor_critic_rich -->
